title: eryngium calaster
intro: Eryngium calaster, also known as Sea Holly or Devil's Thorn, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium calaster include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Eryngium calaster can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
